name: Private Indoor Golf
address: 1901 W 2425 S Suite F, Woods Cross, UT 84087
about: Private Indoor Golf is a dedicated indoor golf simulator facility focused on providing private, distraction-free bay rentals. They feature premium Trackman technology with 29 data points, multiple high-speed cameras, and a massive 24-foot impact screen in a single, spacious bay with 20-foot ceilings. The venue operates on a private membership-only model, offering both pay-per-session bookings and annual membership plans for serious practice, casual play, and entertainment. Their services are geared toward golfers seeking detailed performance insights and a premium, no-crowds environment for improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman simulator with 29 data points for detailed performance analysis
Completely private single bay ensures no crowds or distractions
Spacious design with 20-foot ceilings and a 24-foot impact screen for a realistic feel

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on website; BYOB is not specified.
No alcohol service mentioned on website; BYOB is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Features 29 data points and multiple high-speed cameras for complete swing capture.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You must bring your own clubs as there is no rental service mentioned on the website.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on outside food or drinks, so it is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified on the website, as the focus is on practice and simulator use rather than traditional rounds.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the facility is for private memberships only and is not advertised as kid-friendly; it is geared toward serious golfers and adults.
